name: Prize Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the eggs.
2. Blend in the pumpkin puree, condensed milk, brown sugar, cinnamon, salt, ground cloves, ground ginger, and nutmeg.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
4. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 15 minutes.
5. Reduce the temperature to 375°F (190°C) and bake for about 35 minutes longer, or until the pastry is golden brown and a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Let cool on a rack.
7. Makes 8 servings.
